title: ASR Outdoor Shotgun Cleaning Brush Phosphor Bronze Aluminum Shaft (2 Sizes)
description:
Whether you’re a firearms expert or just getting into shooting, you need to keep your gun clean in order to make sure it performs correctly during use. With the ASR Outdoor 12 Gauge Shotgun Cleaning Brush and regular cleaning, you can ensure that your shotgun performs well and avoids malfunctions out in the field or at the range. This brush is made of phosphor bronze, which is ideal for general purpose, moderate-use cleaning. This material is abrasive yet gentle so it will quickly and effectively remove reside from your gun that may affect performance. It features a durable, lightweight aluminum shaft that easily screws onto most cleaning brush rods designed for shotguns

ASR Outdoor Shotgun Cleaning Brush Phosphor Bronze Aluminum Shaft (2 Sizes)

Whether you’re a firearms expert or just getting into shooting, you need to keep your gun clean in order to make sure it performs correctly during use. With the ASR Outdoor 12 Gauge Shotgun Cleaning Brush and regular cleaning, you can ensure that your shotgun performs well and avoids malfunctions out in the field or at the range.

Key Features

  • 12 GAUGE CLEANING BRUSH – The ASR Outdoor shotgun cleaning brush is designed to fit standard 12 gauge shotguns. Cleaning your gun after each use will help it perform better and avoid malfunctions out in the field or at the range.
  • PHOSPHOR BRONZE BRUSH – Phosphor bronze brushes are great for general-purpose, moderate-use cleaning. Since it’s abrasive yet gentle, the phosphor bronze brush will quickly and effectively remove residue that may affect performance.
  • ALUMINUM SHAFT – The durable yet lightweight aluminum shaft easily screws onto most cleaning brush rods designed for shotguns. Just screw it on to your rod and you can start removing residue right away, making this a great brush to keep in your range bag.
  • EASY TO CLEAN – You can easily clean your phosphor brush after you’re done using it with an alcohol or soap solution and a toothbrush. Just make sure to fully dry your brush after you clean it to ensure there is no residue left before your next use.
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Overall brush length: 3”; Bristle dimensions: 1.75” x 21.25mm diameter; Bristle material: phosphor bronze; Bristle pitch: 5/16-27

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 12GSGCB3
  • UPC: 810058486394
  • Color: Silver

This brush is made of phosphor bronze, which is ideal for general purpose, moderate-use cleaning. This material is abrasive yet gentle so it will quickly and effectively remove reside from your gun that may affect performance. It features a durable, lightweight aluminum shaft that easily screws onto most cleaning brush rods designed for shotguns. Just screw it on to your rod and you can start cleaning right away, making this a great brush to keep in your range bag for immediate use after shooting.

The phosphor bronze brush is easy to clean too – with just a toothbrush and either alcohol or a soap solution, you can easily clean your brush. Just make sure it is completely dry before your next use.

Our brush has an overall length of 3”, and bristle dimensions of 1.75” x 21.25mm. This is a must-have firearm cleaning brush for any 12 gauge shotgun owner!
